summary: Implemented local Site Telemetry CLI wrappers for publish and pull, defaulting to dry-run, requiring explicit send/import before transport, using capability references only at transport time, and testing dry-run, missing config, mocked send, and mocked pull preview without raw secret output.
residuals: Scheduler/runtime recurring publish-pull loops remain later work.
The pull import wrapper currently performs remote candidate preview/poll only; local admission callback wiring remains later runtime work.
